MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff 1259 Vallejo Street LLC is present. Represented by Shirley Warren.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Timothy M. Anderson and Sakurako Hikichi are present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elizabeth Riles, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of April 22, 2013 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
